title: croton tardeflorens
intro: Croton tardeflorens, also known as the slow-growing or late-flowering croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton tardeflorens include the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Croton tardeflorens can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is often used in traditional remedies to treat skin conditions and wounds.
